mac-cheese-the-remix.name: Mac & Cheese: The Remix
instructions: In a large pot over medium heat, combine the pasta and milk. Bring the milk to a simmer and cook until the pasta is tender, 8–10 minutes.
Once the pasta is cooked, remove the pan from the heat and add the butter, American cheese, salt, and pepper. Stir until fully combined. Fold in the broccoli.
Divide between serving bowls and top with the Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

make-some-delicious-tropical-chicken-and.name: Make Some Delicious Tropical Chicken And Mango Skewers
make-some-delicious-tropical-chicken-and.original_name: Haz unas deliciosas brochetas tropicales de pollo y mango
instructions: In a large bowl, mix chicken breast cubes with olive oil, salt and pepper. Be sure that chicken's well covered with condiments.
Corta la cebolla y el pimiento en pedazos grandes para preparar las brochetas. Por otro lado, corta los mangos maduros en forma de cuadrados.
Ensarta los cubos de pollo en los palitos de brocheta, alternando con trozos de mango, pimiento rojo y cebolla roja.

Warm up a grill or frying pan with medium-high heat and put the knuckles onto it. Cooking for 12 minutes, sometimes turning them up, till the chicken is fully baked and the brocketas are golden from all sides.
Retiring from fire and serving hot. Enjoy!

make-ahead-air-fryer-breakfast-burritos.name: Make-ahead Air Fryer Breakfast Burritos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Crumble sausage into a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until no longer pink, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl using a slotted spoon.

Reduce heat to medium. Pour beaten eggs into the skillet and season with salt and pepper. Cook for 3 minutes. Stir and cook for 2 minutes more. Turn heat off. Stir one last time, breaking up larger pieces. Pour into the bowl with the sausage, add cheese, and stir to combine.

Lay out 1 tortilla on a clean work surface. Place 1/4 cup of the sausage-egg mixture on the bottom third of the tortilla, closest to you. Fold the end of the tortilla over the mixture. Fold in both sides of the tortilla over the filling, making an envelope shape. Tuck, roll, and place on a baking sheet seam side down. Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Place baking sheet into the freezer for 2 hours. Transfer burritos to a covered freezer-safe container until ready to serve.
When ready to cook, preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place burrito, seam-side down, in the preheated air fryer, and cook for 5 minutes.

mango-peach-breakfast-lassi.name: Mango-peach Breakfast Lassi
instructions: Combine mangoes, peaches, yogurt, milk, ginger, and 1/2 cup cold water in a blender and purée until smooth. Add honey to taste, if using, and blend again, adding more water if thinner consistency is desired. Pour into glasses (with or without ice) and garnish with mint. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

maple-butter-tarts.name: Maple Butter Tarts
instructions: Place tart shells on a baking sheet; sprinkle raisins evenly into the bottom of tart shells.
Beat brown sugar and butter together in a bowl until smooth; whisk in eggs, maple syrup, flour, vanilla extract, and salt. Fill each tart shell 3/4 full with maple syrup mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set and shells are golden, about 16 minutes. Turn the baking sheet halfway through the baking time for even baking.

maple-pecan-scones.name: Maple-pecan Scones
instructions: Adjust an oven rack to the middle position and preheat to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk cream and 3 tablespoons maple syrup together in a bowl.

Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a food processor; pulse 3 times to combine. Drop cold butter pieces evenly over top and continue to pulse until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal, about 6 pulses.
Transfer flour mixture to a large bowl. Add toasted pecans and cream mixture. Stir until dough begins to come together.

Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until a rough, sticky ball forms. Divide into 2 balls and flatten slightly. Cut each circle into 4 wedges and transfer to the prepared baking sheet.
Bake on the middle rack of the preheated oven until tops are golden brown, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool on a baking rack, about 10 minutes.
While the scones are cooling, make the glaze: Whisk 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons confectioners' sugar and 2 tablespoons maple syrup together until well combined.
Drizzle glaze over scones.

maple-syrup-glazed-bacon-breakfast-carbo.name: Maple Syrup-glazed Bacon Breakfast Carbonara
instructions: Heat oil in a large, high-sided skillet over medium heat. Add bacon and cook, stirring occasionally and sprinkling with garlic powder, until browned and crispy, 7 to 8 minutes.
Meanwhile, beat eggs in a separate bowl. Mix in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and black pepper.

Remove bacon onto paper towels to drain, reserving 3 tablespoons of the oil and bacon grease in the pan. Return bacon to the pan, stir in maple syrup, and bring to a simmer. Quickly turn heat down to low and let simmer for 1 to 2 minutes.

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Drain pasta in a strainer set over large glass bowl. Pour 1/4 cup of the pasta water into the skillet with the bacon; stir. Add pasta and toss until coated.

Pour remaining pasta water out of the large bowl. Drop the coated noodles into the bowl. Pour in the egg mixture and quickly toss with the pasta until cheese has melted and sauce is creamy and smooth, 1 to 2 minutes.

maple-sriracha-glazed-bacon.name: Maple-sriracha Glazed Bacon
instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 400°. Arrange bacon in a single layer on 2 foil-lined rimmed baking sheets (it’s okay if strips overlap slightly; they’ll shrink as they cook). Bake, rotating pans back to front and top to bottom halfway through, until bacon is browned but not quite crisp, 16–18 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes. (You can also let cooked bacon rest on pans at room temperature up to 2 hours.)

Whisk maple syrup, soy sauce, and Sriracha in a small bowl to combine. Using tongs, turn bacon on pans. Using a pastry brush, brush bacon on one side with glaze. Return to oven and bake, rotating pans back to front and top to bottom halfway through, until bacon is crisp, 10–15 minutes (time will vary depending on your preferred level of crispiness).

mapo-chili-mac.name: Mapo Chili Mac

ingredients.prep: plus thinly sliced dark and pale green scallion parts for serving
coarsely grated (about 1 0.5 cups), plus more for serving

instructions: Cook 12 oz. elbow macaroni in a large pot of boiling water according to package directions; drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, remove dark green tops from 1 bunch scallions and thinly slice; set aside. Thinly slice white and pale green parts of scallions. Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add white and pale green parts of scallions and cook, stirring often with a wooden spoon or heatproof rubber spatula, until slightly softened, 1–2 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add 1 lb. ground pork and 2 Tbsp. ground Sichuan peppercorns and cook, stirring and breaking up meat into smaller pieces, until just cooked through, about 3 minutes. Add ⅓–½ cup doubanjiang (Sichuan-style fermented chili bean paste), depending on the intensity of your brand, and cook, stirring, until combined, about 1 minute. Add one 28-oz. can crushed tomatoes and 1 cup water. Reduce heat so chili is at a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until combined and slightly thickened, 8–10 minutes.

Remove pot from heat; add 12 oz. sharp yellow cheddar, coarsely grated (about 1½ cups), 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, reserved pasta, and reserved dark green scallion tops and stir until cheese and butter are melted and ingredients are combined. Taste mapo chili mac and season with soy sauce if needed (your doubanjiang may be salty and savory enough without it).
Ladle mapo chili mac into bowls and top each with a dollop of sour cream, more cheddar, and some thinly sliced scallion tops; sprinkle with more ground Sichuan peppercorns.

marida-teganite-argiro.name: Marida Teganite
instructions: Food from Patmos, that you can use other medium-sized fish but gives a better result.
Clean, wash the fish and place them in a colander. Salt them at will.
Put the oil in a large pan to heat.
Sauté themm and a few.Fries them over medium to high heat, until evening golden. Learn all the secrets about perfect flying fish.
We put them on a platter.
Place 1/4 cup olive oil in a clean pan and add the garlic into slices and fresh rosemary.
Sauté for 2-3 minutes.
Add the fish to the pan with garlic and rosemary.
Add the vinegar and cover the pan.
Leave 1′ and then put out the fire.
Keep it closed until the fish cool completely.
Remove the fish with their sauce on a platter.
Enjoy. The delicious lamb on the platter requires fresh dough. The famous monastic yeast of Patmos.
This unique traditional recipe of the Aegean, Mrs Maroula shared with us and we thank her very much.
See all the recipes shown on the show "The Mothers of the Aegean".

marinated-goat-cheese-with-herbs-and-spi.name: Marinated Goat Cheese With Herbs And Spices

ingredients.prep: sliced  0.5 inch thick on a diagonal

instructions: Gently break goat cheese into large pieces; arrange in a serving bowl. Let sit at room temperature while you infuse oil.

Crush allspice and coriander with the flat side of a chef’s knife. Place in a small saucepan along with garlic, orange zest, bay leaves, star anise, oil, and red pepper flakes. Cook over low, swirling pan occasionally, until garlic is golden, 15–20 minutes. Pour over goat cheese. Let sit until cool, about 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 425°. Arrange bread in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and toast until golden brown around the edges, 5–8 minutes.
Sprinkle marinated goat cheese with flaky salt and serve with toast.
Do Ahead: Goat cheese can be marinated 3 hours ahead. Store lightly covered at room temperature.

mascarpone-stuffed-french-toast-with-pea.name: Mascarpone Stuffed French Toast With Peaches
instructions: Slice peaches over a heavy-duty saucepan to catch juices; discard pits. Stir in sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg; cook over medium heat until bubbly and sauce reaches a syrupy consistency, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat; set aside.
Meanwhile, cut off and discard ends of rolls. Cut rolls into 1 1/4-inch-thick slices. Cut a horizontal pocket into each slice, leaving three sides intact; set aside.

Stir mascarpone, confectioners' sugar, and lemon zest together until smooth; transfer to a small resealable plastic bag. Snip off one corner of the bag; pipe as much filling into pocket of each bread slice as fits without overflowing.
Whisk eggs, milk, and vanilla together in a shallow bowl.
Melt butter with oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Dip stuffed bread slices in egg mixture. Add to the skillet; cook until browned on both sides. Serve hot with warm peach sauce.

mashed-potatoes-and-recipe-pequerecetas.name: Mashed Potatoes ( And Recipe)
mashed-potatoes-and-recipe-pequerecetas.original_name: Puré de patatas casero (receta FÁCIL y rápida)

ingredients.item: 75 g de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: We washed the potatoes under the tap, if they bring ground. We put them into a pot or saucepan, without peeling, and we cover them with cold water, we add salt and put them into the fire. Once water starts to boil we can count the time, the potatoes take about 30 minutes to cook, though this will depend on the size and type of potato, can be a little less or a little more. How do we know they're cooked? With a knife we have to pinch the potatoes, and they have to come and leave with no resistance. Once cooked, we remove them from the fire, we scattering their water and let them cool a little, just fair enough to avoid burning our fingers.
We fight the potatoes, they have to stay hot, and we put them in an extensive Mashaca bowl with a fork, a pinged or we pass through a Chinese. We added salt and warm milk and oil and we mixed well.

mast-o-laboo-beet-yogurt.name: Mast-o-laboo (beet Yogurt)
instructions: Bring a saucepan of water to a boil. Stir sugar into water to dissolve. Cook beets in boiling water until tender, about 45 minutes; drain and cool beets completely.
Cut cooled beets into 1/2-inch cubes. Measure 1/2 cup of beet cubes and reserve remainder for later use.
Stir beets into yogurt in a bowl; season with salt.

master-sweet-dough.name: Master Sweet Dough

ingredients.prep: cut into 1-inch pieces, room temperature, plus 1/2 tablespoon

instructions: Heat milk in a small saucepan over medium heat or in a microwave until an instant-read thermometer registers 110°–115°. Transfer milk to a 2-cup measuring cup; stir in 1 Tbsp. sugar. Sprinkle yeast over milk and whisk to blend. Let sit until yeast is foamy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs; whisk until smooth.

Combine remaining 4 Tbsp. sugar, flour, and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a dough hook. (If making Vanilla Cloverleaf Sweet Rolls, scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. If making Apricot-Anise Tarts, add aniseed.) Add milk mixture. With mixer running, add 1/2 cup room-temperature butter, 1 piece at a time, blending well between additions. Mix on medium speed for 1 minute. Knead on medium-high speed until dough is soft and silky, about 5 minutes.

Brush a medium bowl with some melted butter; place dough in bowl. Brush top of dough with remaining melted butter; cover with plastic wrap. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover with plastic; chill.
Let dough rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled in size, 1–1 1/2 hours (or 2–2 1/2 hours if dough has been refrigerated).

No stand mixer? Don't worry. Fit your food processor with the standard chopping or dough blade, then make the milk mixture according to the dough recipe (above), including whisking in the eggs. Combine remaining 4 Tbsp. sugar, flour, and salt in food processor. (If making Vanilla Cloverleaf Sweet Rolls, scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. If making Apricot-Anise Tarts, add aniseed.) Pulse to blend. Add milk mixture; process until combined. With processor running, add 1/2 cup room-temperature butter, 1 piece at a time, blending well between additions. Process until dough is soft and silky, 2–3 minutes longer. Dough will be sticky but should not be greasy. If it is greasy, process for an additional 1–2 minutes. Transfer dough to the buttered bowl and continue with recipe as directed.

matcha-tea-ice-cream-without-sugar-argir.name: Matcha Tea Ice Cream Without Sugar

ingredients.item: 1 tc powder green tea matcha (organic products)
1 tc powder green tea matcha (organic products)

instructions: For the antioxidant matcha tea ice cream, clean the bananas first.
Cut them into thin slices and refrigerate for 1 hour for matcha tea ice cream.
Allow the ice to break for 5 minutes at room temperature.
In bowls add the green tea powder and add the lukewarm water to the surface.
[adrotate banner=”71′′]
Let it cool completely.
In the blender, add the frozen bananas, green tea, agave syrup and coconut milk.
Serve immediately as it is frozen and fluffy as gelato and enjoy all the benefits that antioxidant green tea matcha offers us.
Do you want more sugar-free recipes? Find them all here!

matoke-recipe-lezzet.name: Matoke Recipe

ingredients.item: 6–7 pieces of green banana (plantain – immature banana)
400 gr ad beef (can also be used in chicken)
2 tablespoons of liquid oil or butter
2 cups of broth or vegetable suy  u
1 handle fresh kin or fresh onion (for service)

instructions: 1. Peel the shells of our green menas and peel the iri pars of them in the form.
2. Heat oil in the pot, add meats and mu in the fire of the heart.
3. Shake the meats water and roast it until it is possible.
4. Add Credits onions and yellowms and add a few min roast.
5. Add butter, salça,red pepper and smear.
6. Cook for 5 minutes by caring.
7. Add broth or vegetable juice, until meat starts softening (about 25–30 minutes).
8. Take chopped bananas in the pot.
9. Continue cooking up to cooking with cooking meat.
10. Hotly, u wealth you by spreading finely eat dirt or fresh onion.

meat-with-soy-sauce-and-colorful-vegetab.name: Meat With Soy Sauce And Colorful Vegetables
instructions: 1. Kimi materials are matched in the same recipe, an unconditional flavor is captured.
2. You can capture this flavor by offering you with vegetables garnies that you will be prepared very practically.
3. Wash vegetables.
4. Crochet vegetables in equal sizes.
5. Cook all chopped vegetables in the pan with corns.
6. Add 2 spoon soy sauce and get the colors of vegetables from the stove without loss.
7. roast meats on the other side until they shake their water.
8. Add 3 spoon soy sauce close to January.
9. Place the vegetables you prepared in shape the service plate.
10. Add meats to your stores.
11. 11. Decorate your plate with a few drops of soy sauce and fine chopped parsley and warm service.

meatball-the-dons-special.name: Meatball: The Don’s Special

ingredients.item: Sam's choice® italia tagliatelle egg pasta

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
Place the meatballs on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C).

Bring 4 quarts (4 liters) of salted water to a boil in a large pot. Add the tagliatelle and return the water to a boil. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the pasta is tender, about 9 minutes. Remove from the heat and strain.
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, bring the marinara sauce to a simmer.
Serve the pasta with the meatballs, sauce, and Parmesan.
Enjoy!

meatballs-with-tomato-2-family-recipes-p.name: Meatballs With Tomato (2 Family Recipes)
meatballs-with-tomato-2-family-recipes-p.original_name: Albóndigas con tomate (2 recetas familiares perfectas)

ingredients.item: 1 kg de carne picada, mitad cerdo y mitad ternera

instructions: Ponemos en el mortero el ajo pelado, la sal, la pimienta y el perejil, y majamos bien. Mojamos el pan con la leche y escurrimos
We put in an extensive bowl minced flesh and we add salt and parsley and garlic and ginger and pepper and egg and pat of bread that we have drenched with milk and drained.
with a fork we mix everything well. Once it's all mixed up, with our hands we form little balls. To help you get the same amount of dough you can use an ice cream spoon.
We pass through flour slightly When we have all our meatballs made, we fry them in a frying pan with abundant extra and hot virgin olive oil.
Al sacarlas las dejamos en un plato con papel de cocina para que absorban el exceso de aceite.
In a medium-heat saucer with an oil bottom we soften the onion and garlic minced until they are golden.
We added the crushed tomato, a pint of salt and sugar.
We let the tomato cold by cooking for about 15 minutes.
We put in the meatballs we had booked We let them cook with soft heat for 10 minutes We get and serve

melon-and-avocado-crudo.name: Melon And Avocado Crudo

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or white wine vinegar

ingredients.prep: rind and seeds removed, cut into 3x1" pieces
thinly sliced, plus more for serving

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a small skillet over medium-low. Add 1 garlic clove, finely grated, one 1" piece ginger, scrubbed, finely grated, 2 oil-packed anchovy fillets, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until anchovies are dissolved but garlic hasn’t taken on any color, about 30 seconds. Scrape mixture into a small bowl. Let cool slightly, then add ¼ cup finely chopped cilantro, 1 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or white wine vinegar, and remaining 4 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil. Cut 1 lime in half; squeeze in juice from 1 half and whisk to combine. Season dressing with kosher salt.

Toss ½ small honeydew melon, rind and seeds removed, sliced into 3x1" pieces, and half of dressing in a large bowl to coat. Add 2 avocados, cut into 2" pieces, ½ small white onion, thinly sliced, and remaining dressing; toss gently to coat.

Transfer salad to a platter or shallow bowl and squeeze juice from remaining lime half over. Top with cilantro leaves, mint, and more onion; season with freshly ground black pepper and flaky sea salt.

mexican-cold-pea-soup.name: Mexican Cold Pea Soup
instructions: Add peas to the bowl of a food processor or blender; pulse, constantly scraping down the sides of the bowl, until puréed. Add a little lime juice if peas are too dry. Add yogurt, olive oil, remaining lime juice, garlic, and chili powder; pulse until liquefied. Pour soup into a large bowl; stir in ice water and salt until incorporated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; refrigerate until flavors combine, 4 to 6 hours to overnight.
Garnish servings with bell pepper, tomato, and jalapeño.

mexican-pasta-salad.name: Mexican Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Canned whole-kernel corn with red and green bell peppers

instructions: Bring a large pot with lightly salted water to a rolling boil. Stir in pasta and return to a boil. Cook pasta uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes.

While pasta is cooking, combine salsa, mayonnaise, sour cream, and bell pepper in a large bowl. Add black beans, corn, olives, green onions, salt, garlic powder, cumin, cilantro, and pepper; stir until well combined.
Drain pasta. Rinse under cold running water until completely cooled; drain thoroughly.
Add cooled pasta to salsa and vegetable mixture; stir until evenly coated. For best results, cover salad with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled before serving.

mezcal-chocolate-cocktail-epicurious.name: Mezcal Chocolate Cocktail | Epicurious
instructions: Mix honey and 2 Tbsp. boiling water in a quart-size jar. Stir to dissolve honey; let cool. Stir in mezcal, orange liqueur, bitters, and 1/2 cup plus 1 Tbsp. water. Seal and freeze at least 2 hours and up to 2 weeks.
To serve, turn jar gently to mix. Place ice in a rocks glass and pour in cocktail. Squeeze oils from orange twist over, rub peel around rim of glass, then garnish glass with peel.

mikes-chipotle-salsa.name: Mike's Chipotle Salsa

ingredients.prep: roughly chopped, or more to taste

instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Combine tomatoes, chiles in adobo sauce, cilantro, onion, jalapenos, lime juice, garlic, and salt in a blender.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Blend on low speed until all ingredients are coarsely chopped.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Place in the refrigerator and chill for at least 2 hours prior to serving.'}

millet-couscous-with-roasted-carrots.name: Millet Couscous With Roasted Carrots

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add millet and cumin seeds and cook, stirring, until beginning to brown, about 2 minutes. Add broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until millet is tender, 25–35 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss carrots with 2 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast until tender and golden brown, 15–20 minutes.
Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a small skillet over medium-low heat; cook almonds and cayenne, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Serve millet drizzled with oil and topped with carrots, cilantro, almond mixture.

minced-meat-hunkar-begendi-recipe-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Hünkar Beyendi Recip Home

ingredients.item: Badem milk or oatme milk (non-gloss alternative)
Language cheese or mozzarella (more alienated drink)
Mercimek + Mushroom Blend (for free, vegetarian version)
Dry onions can be used onions or fresh onions instead.
Newflower or cinnamon instead of cinnamon; ottoman (Romanian cuisine for specific aromatic taste)
Hard pepper or isot for painful lovers

instructions: 1. K&ouml in January or oven; peel off the shells of eggplants you want and finely chop.
2. melt and roast the butter in the pan.
3. Ü suffice add, purulent until you are.
4. Add and mix menu.
5. Taste salt, pepper and bake cheese.
6. Take the edge.
7. Roast on olive oil.
8. Add water and roast the water to the water and the water.
9. Add salça and reindeed stones.
10. Cook the spices for 5–10 minutes with the addition of hot water.
11. 11. 11. 11. First-like article, udeveloped flanktanding hot service.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

mini-burgers-argiro.name: Mini Burgers

ingredients.item: 1 cup dry yeast 25 g or 1 sachet dry yeast
1 cup dry yeast 25 g or 1 sachet dry yeast

instructions: To make the buns, we first activate the yeast.
Dissolve it in a bowl, sprinkle with some sugar and add some water.
Mix to dissolve.
Cover with membrane and allow for 10′ to activate.
When the surface is foamed, add to the flour.

mini-chicken-waffles-with-whipped-honey.name: Mini Chicken & Waffles With Whipped Honey
instructions: Brine the chicken bites: Cut the chicken into 20 bite-sized pieces and place into a medium bowl. Add the buttermilk and hot sauce; mix with a spoon until the chicken is evenly coated. Place in the refrigerator to marinate for at least 1 hour.

Meanwhile, make the whipped honey: Pour the honey into the bowl of an electric stand mixer. Using the whip attachment, whisk on high speed for 15-20 minutes, until the honey turns pale and creamy. Transfer to a glass jar with a lid. Set aside.
Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200°C). Coat the basket of the air fryer with avocado oil spray.
Air fry the chicken bites: In a large shallow bowl, mix together the flour, paprika, salt, and pepper with a spoon or whisk until combined. In a separate medium shallow bowl, add the beaten eggs.

Remove the chicken from the refrigerator. Working one at a time, remove the chicken from the marinade and dredge in the flour mixture to coat on all sides. Dip the chicken into the beaten eggs, then dip again in the flour to coat all over. Transfer the coated chicken to the prepared air fryer basket. Repeat with the remaining chicken, arranging them in an even layer in the air fryer basket. Discard the buttermilk marinade.

Generously mist the tops of the coated chicken with avocado oil spray. Air fry for 14-16 minutes, until golden brown and crispy, flipping the pieces over halfway. Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.

Make the waffles: Preheat a mini waffle iron. Prepare enough of the packaged waffle mix according to the instructions to make 20 mini waffles. Scoop the batter into each section of the preheated waffle iron, and cook for 3-4 minutes, until golden brown.

Assemble the chicken & waffles: Arrange the mini waffles in a single layer on a board or platter and place a chicken bite over each one. Spoon about ¼ teaspoon chili crisp oil over each chicken bite, then drizzle with about 1 teaspoon whipped honey and garnish with chives.
Enjoy!

mini-onion-bacon-pies.name: Mini Onion Bacon Pies
instructions: Preheat oven to 325˚F (170˚C).
Saute bacon in a medium-sized frying pan. Add squash and onion, until the onions are translucent and the squash golden brown. Season with sage, salt, and pepper. Set aside to cool.
Roll out pie crust into an even thin layer. With a 6-inch (15 cm) diameter bowl, cut out 6 circles. Fill a 6-cup cupcake tin with the cutouts.
Mix eggs, sour cream, and milk. Season with salt and pepper.
Add the onion-pumpkin-bacon mixture into the cups.
Carefully pour egg mixture into every cup. Decorate pies with leftover pie crust, if desired.
Cover edges and decoration with egg wash.
Bake for 40 minutes or until egg mixture is cooked through and crust is golden brown. (Cover top with aluminum foil for the last 10 minutes if decoration gets too dark.)
Enjoy!

molten-dulce-de-leche-cakes.name: Molten Dulce De Leche Cakes

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for ramekins
Canned or jarred dulce de leche

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (218°C).
Butter and flour individual ramekins; transfer them to a rimmed baking sheet.
Using an electric mixer, beat the egg yolks and the whole egg in a medium bowl until the mixture has doubled in volume and holds a slight ribbon when lifted, which should take about 2 1/2 minutes.
Add the dulce de leche to the egg mixture; beat until it is well blended. Then, gradually add the 2 1/2 tablespoons of flour; beat again until completely blended.
Divide the batter evenly among the prepared ramekins.
Transfer the baking sheet with the ramekins to the preheated oven.
Bake the cakes until their outsides are golden brown in color, but the centers still jiggle slightly, typically 12–14 minutes.
Transfer the baking sheet from the oven to a wire rack.
Carefully run a knife around the edges of the ramekins to loosen the cakes; invert them onto individual plates or into shallow bowls.
Serve the cakes hot with your choice of vanilla or banana ice cream.

monkfish-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Monkfish In The Oven
instructions: Cut the barrel into pieces and season them with salt and pepper. Light a frying pan with the olive oil and let it warm. Pass the pieces of barrel by flour, put them in the frying pan and let them fry until they are golden on both sides. Remove and place on an oven tray.

Peel off the onions and garlic, cut the onions in half-moons and pick the garlic. Add these ingredients to the frying pan, with the olive oil in which you fried the fish, add the blond, stir and let the onion cook until smooth.
Adicione depois o colorau e o tomate picado com o molho, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, e mexendo de vez em quando, durante 10 minutos.
Lay the previous mixture on the barrel, sprinkle with grated bread and take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, until golden. Serve right away.

monkfish-rice-with-shrimp-teleculinaria.name: Monkfish Rice With Shrimp
instructions: Season the drum with salt and lemon juice. Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth, put them in a pot, light the fire with the olive oil and the laurel leaf and let it shine. Add the fish and shrimp and let it saute for a few minutes.
Add the water to the rice cooking and season with salt and spicy. Let it boil, add the rice and let it cook.
Then add the clam cream, previously dissolved in a little water, and stir. Add the chopped corianders, correct the seasonings, remove from the fire and serve immediately.

mott-st-ssam-sauce.name: Mott St Ssam Sauce
instructions: Mix shallot, jalapeño, doenjang, and gochujang in a small bowl, adding water as needed to thin sauce (aim for the consistency of blue cheese dressing).
DO AHEAD: Sauce can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mulligatawny-inspired-soup.name: Mulligatawny Inspired Soup
instructions: Heat a stock pot or Dutch oven on medium low heat and to it, add olive oil and butter. Sweat out onion, celery, and carrots until softened.
Add apple and garlic, and saute until garlic is fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add canned tomatoes, broths or stocks, and all spices/herbs. Bring to a boil and then reduce to a simmer for about 30 minutes,until all vegetables and the apples are nice and soft.
Add in shredded chicken and rice and simmer for about 10 more minutes to let flavors blend.
Remove bay leaves and serve.

mummy-dogs.name: Mummy Dogs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C.
Unroll dough, separate at perforations, creating 4 rectangles. Press perforations to seal.

With a knife or pizza cutter cut each rectangle lengthwise into 8 strips making a total of 32 strips. Wrap one strip of dough around each Lit'l Smokies stretching dough slightly to look like bandages, leaving tip exposed to create face. Place on ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 12 to 14 minutes. Draw features on tip of Lit'l Smokies to create face. Serve with mustard or ketchup, if desired.

mushroom-diblesi-recipe-lezzet.name: Mushroom Diblesi Recipe

ingredients.item: Dry white onion instead of red onion
You can get a deeper aroma using mixed mushrooms
Bulgur (for those who don’t want to use rice)
Cakey or black leaf (can be used and then used when it comes to crack)

2. Add chopped onions with fat daughter and roast to soften.

mushroom-tacos.name: Mushroom Tacos
instructions: Add mushrooms to food processor and pulse until a crumbly consistency is formed, making sure not to over-pulse.
Heat olive oil in pan over medium heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the mushrooms and saute for 8-10 minutes, or until most water has evaporated.
Add soy sauce, cumin, chili powder and pepper. Sauté for 5 more minutes, or until desired consistency is reached.
Serve on warm tortillas with desired taco toppings.
Enjoy!
